column8: Angular COBBLES and GRAVELS of moderately decomposed granite with sand and some silt, some and some concrete fragments. (FILL)
Sub-rounded COBBLES and GRAVELS of moderately decomposed granite and tuff with some silt and sand. (ALLUVIUM)

Moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately to slightly decomposed, fine to medium grained GRANITE with medium to widely spaced, extremely close to very narrow, rough planar, infinite, moderately stained and kaolin coated joints dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees and 70 degrees-80 degrees.
